title: Conditions for collection and processing
description: To demonstrate that processing is lawful, with legal basis as per applicable jurisdictions, with clearly defined and legitimate purposes.

title: Obligations to PII principals
description: To ensure that PII principals are provided with appropriate information about the processing of their PII, and to meet any other applicable obligations to PII principals related to the processing of their PII.

title: Privacy by design and privacy by default
description: To ensure that processes and systems are designed such that the collection and processing of PII (including use, disclosure, retention, transmission and disposal) are limited to what is necessary for the identified purpose.

title: PII sharing, transfer and disclosure
description: To determine whether, and document when, PII is shared, transferred to other jurisdictions or third parties or disclosed in accordance with applicable obligations.
